2603.29741.title: BotVerse: Real-Time Event-Driven Simulation of Social Agents
2603.29741.paper_summary: BotVerse is a scalable, event-driven framework for high-fidelity social simulation using LLM-based agents. It addresses the ethical risks of studying autonomous agents on live networks by isolating interactions within a controlled environment while grounding them in real-time content streams from the Bluesky ecosystem. The system features an asynchronous orchestration API and a simulation engine that emulates human-like temporal patterns and cognitive memory. Through the Synthetic Social Observatory, researchers can deploy customizable personas and observe multimodal interactions at scale. We demonstrate BotVersevia a coordinated disinformation scenario, providing a safe, experimental framework for red-teaming and computational social scientists. A video demonstration of the framework is available at https://youtu.be/eZSzO5Jarqk.
2603.29741.paper_summary_zh: BotVerse是一個可擴展的事件驅動框架，用於高保真社會模擬，採用基於LLM的代理。<lb/>它通過在受控環境中隔離互動，同時將其基於來自Bluesky生態系統的實時內容流，來解決在實時網絡上研究自主代理的倫理風險。<lb/>該系統具有異步協調API和模擬引擎，能夠模擬類人時間模式和認知記憶。<lb/>通過合成社會觀測站，研究人員可以部署可自定義的人物角色，並觀察大規模的多模態互動。<lb/>我們通過協調的虛假信息場景展示BotVerse，為紅隊和計算社會科學家提供了一個安全的實驗框架。<lb/>該框架的視頻演示可在https://youtu.be/eZSzO5Jarqk查看。
2603.29741.author: Edoardo Allegrini et.al.
2603.29741.authors: Edoardo Allegrini, Edoardo Di Paolo, Angelo Spognardi, Marinella Petrocchi
